lines.lyrics: Mere sapnon ki rani kab aayegi tu
lines.indian: Ga Ga Dha Dha Dha Pa Ni Ni Ni Pa Dha Dha Dha Dha

lines.lyrics: Aayi rut mastaani kab aayegi tu
lines.indian: Ga Ga Dha Dha Dha Pa Ni Ni Ni Pa Dha ma ma ma

lines.lyrics: Beeti jaaye zindagaani kab aayegi tu
lines.indian: Ga Ga Dha Dha Dha Pa Ni Ni Ni Dha Sa' Sa' Sa' Sa'
Ga' Ni Ni: Re' Re' Ni Dha Dha:
